# Clerk Provider

Manage Clerk resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "clerk" {
  # Set the CLERK_API_KEY environment variable
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Clerk secret key. Can also be set via CLERK_API_KEY environment variable.
